manual_data_entry.title: Automate Manual Data Entry
tutorial_steps: Identify the data source (CSV, web form, database).
Install pandas: pip install pandas openpyxl
Write a script to read the source and write to the destination.
Schedule with Windows Task Scheduler.
Optional: use IBM RPA for GUI-based entry automation.

repetitive_copy_paste.title: Eliminate Copy-Paste with Automation
tutorial_steps: Open Microsoft Power Automate.
Create a new Desktop flow.
Record the copy-paste sequence.
Parameterize the source and destination.
Schedule or trigger the flow automatically.

email_sorting.title: AI-Powered Email Triage
tutorial_steps: Open Outlook → File → Manage Rules & Alerts.
Create rules for subject/sender patterns.
For advanced classification, integrate watsonx.ai via the API.
Use IBM App Connect to route emails to correct folders automatically.

document_formatting.title: Automated Document Formatting
tutorial_steps: Install python-docx: pip install python-docx
Create a Word template (.docx) with placeholder styles.
Write a Python script to fill the template from a data source.
Run the script to generate formatted documents in bulk.

file_organization.title: Smart Automated File Organization
tutorial_steps: Install watchdog: pip install watchdog
Write a handler that classifies files by extension or name pattern.
Start the watchdog observer on your target directory.
Files are moved automatically as soon as they appear.

browser_research.title: AI Research Summarization
tutorial_steps: Open IBM watsonx Prompt Lab at cloud.ibm.com.
Paste the web content you want summarized.
Use the summarize prompt template.
Integrate via API to batch-process multiple pages.

report_generation.title: Automated Report Generation Pipeline
tutorial_steps: Use pandas to read and transform your raw data.
Use python-docx to populate a report template.
Use watsonx.ai to write an executive summary section.
Schedule the pipeline with Windows Task Scheduler.
Email the output automatically via smtplib.
